name: ny-medicaid-precert
description: New York State Medicaid prior-authorization packet for a hospital-outpatient (POS 22) knee arthroscopy on an adult member. The 'New York State Medicaid' / eMedNY letterhead routes the bundle to the 'medicaid-ny' payer bucket (spec-v52 §4.5.31); both the §4.5.4 state-agnostic Medicaid core (R-PA-MCD-NNN, via isMedicaid) and the New York Medicaid overlay (R-PA-MCNY-NNN) engage. The packet is a complete Medicaid request -- eligibility verified, state medical-necessity criteria cited, MCO/FFS indicated -- so the Medicaid core passes; it names the eMedNY channel (R-PA-MCNY-003 pass) and attaches a clinical note (R-PA-MCNY-001/002 pass). As an outpatient surgery requested in a hospital-outpatient setting it carries no site-of-care rationale (R-PA-MCNY-009 flag). The member is an adult, so EPSDT self-gates off. Every other New York Medicaid overlay rule self-gates off and vacuously passes.

documents.name: ny-medicaid-pa.txt
documents.text:
New York State Medicaid Prior Authorization Request (submitted via eMedNY)
Patient: Mary C Roe
DOB: 1968-11-22
Member ID: AB12345C
Date of service: 2026-06-25
Place of service: 22
Requested procedure: knee arthroscopy with meniscectomy CPT 29881
Dx: M23.205 derangement of medial meniscus, left knee
Quantity: 1
Ordering provider NPI: 1234567893
Servicing facility NPI: 1306849393
TIN: 123456789
Plan: Medicaid managed care plan.
Eligibility verified: active eligibility on file for the date of service.
Medical necessity: persistent mechanical symptoms; see the applicable Medical Policy and the Medicaid medical necessity criteria.
Signature: Ortho Sports MD, 2026-06-10

documents.name: ny-medicaid-note.txt
documents.text:
Clinical note
Chief complaint: left knee pain with locking and catching.
History of present illness: four months of mechanical symptoms despite activity modification.
Physical exam: positive McMurray on the left; joint-line tenderness medially.
Assessment and plan: left medial meniscus tear; recommend arthroscopic partial meniscectomy.
Medical necessity: imaging confirms a displaced medial meniscus tear.
Note date: 2026-06-10
Signed: Ortho Sports MD, 2026-06-10
